cholelithiasis, hepatobiliary insufficiency with liver failure, fatigue, weight loss, jaundice, pruritus, and anasarca due to fluid retention
autoimmune thyroid disease, adrenocortical insufficiency, chronic pancreatitis resulting in exocrine insufficiency, hyperglycemia, muscle wasting, and limb hypertrophy
peripheral neuropathies affecting distal muscles, foot drop, tip-toe gait, thigh hypertrophy, and potential conduction blockage detected by electromyography
liver cirrhosis from accumulation of misfolded protein, emphysema, dyspnea, and increased susceptibility to respiratory tract infections
unilateral or bilateral paralysis of medial rectus muscles causing esodeviations and strabismus, which may contribute to double vision and difficulty focusing during reading
systemic symptoms such as fever, night sweats, weight loss, cough, and shortness of breath; granuloma formation is characteristic of tubercular lesions
skeletal deformities including scoliosis, kyphosis, joint laxity, and contractures; corneal cloudiness, dental anomalies, cardiac valve thickening, and pulmonary complications
recurrent episodes of fever, arthritis, serositis, erysipeloides-like erythema, and abdominal pain
pituitary tumors causing growth hormone excess, Cushing's syndrome, acromegaly, and ACTH-dependent hypercortisolism along with other endocrine manifestations
